name: Ultimate Macaroni and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups extra-sharp cheddar cheese (5 oz), cubed
1 1/4 cups packed extra-sharp cheese (5 oz), grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°.
2. Lightly butter a 9x13x2-inch glass baking dish.
3. Cook macaroni in a large saucepan of boiling salted water until just tender but still firm to bite. Drain the pasta.
4. Transfer the drained macaroni to the prepared baking dish.
5. Mix in the cubed cheese.
6. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, salt, mustard, ground pepper, cayenne, and nutmeg until no lumps remain.
7. Gradually whisk in half and half, then whipping cream and sour cream. Add eggs and Worcestershire sauce; whisk to blend.
8. Pour the mixture over the macaroni mixture; stir to combine.
9. Sprinkle the grated cheese on top.
10. Bake for 25 minutes or until set around the edges but still liquid in the center. Remove from oven and let stand 10 minutes to thicken slightly (sauce will be creamy).
11. Makes 10-12 side-dish servings. About 4 as main course.
